system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_tongmetvuong","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_SON3_TONGMETVUONG](@donhang nvarchar(max))
AS
BEGIN
	-- DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(max) = 'RAY-33028'
	SELECT B.hehang, B.masp, B.tensp, B.mausac, SUM(A.order_qty) AS soluong_donhang 
	INTO #DONHANG_SANXUAT
	FROM tr_order_detail A INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
	WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
		AND A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND ISNULL(A.khongtinhson, 0) = 0
	GROUP BY B.hehang, B.masp, B.tensp, B.mausac

	SELECT A1.hehang, A1.masp, A1.tensp,
		soluong_donhang = SUM(DISTINCT A1.soluong_donhang),

		DT_MATSON = SUM(A1.metvuong),
		DT_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN metvuong END),
		DT_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN metvuong END),

		KL_MATSON = SUM(A1.dinhluong),
		KL_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN dinhluong END),
		KL_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN dinhluong END),

		DTT_MATSON = SUM(A1.metvuong * A1.soluong_donhang),
		DTT_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),
		DTT_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN metvuong * soluong_donhang END),

		KLT_MATSON = SUM(A1.dinhluong * soluong_donhang),
		KLT_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END),
		KLT_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A1.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN dinhluong * soluong_donhang END)
	FROM (
		SELECT A.hehang, A.masp, A.tensp, A.mausac, A.matson, 
			SUM(DISTINCT A.metvuong) AS metvuong,
			SUM(A.soluong) AS dinhluong, 
			SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_donhang) AS soluong_donhang
		FROM (
			SELECT C.hehang, C.masp, C.tensp, C.mausac, A.matson, A.soluong, A.metvuong, C.soluong_donhang
			FROM (
				SELECT A.masp, A.matson, A.soluong * B.metvuong AS soluong, B.metvuong
				FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
					INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
				WHERE A.makhuvuc = 'SON' AND A.soluong * B.metvuong > 0
					AND A.masp IN (SELECT masp FROM #DONHANG_SANXUAT)
				) A
				RIGHT JOIN #DONHANG_SANXUAT C ON A.masp = C.masp
		
		) A
		GROUP BY A.hehang, A.masp, A.tensp, A.mausac, A.matson
	) A1
	GROUP BY A1.hehang, A1.masp, A1.tensp

	DROP TABLE #DONHANG_SANXUAT;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
